Who cares about wounds, when you're able to draw your entire deck? Picked up Wolerine's rare very early, and paired with Ultimate Spiderman's rare and a whole bunch of card draw, I accumulated 60+ attack on the final turn wiping out Mephisto in one fell swoop!!

column33: We had BP and FFU’s rares in the opening HQ. We decided to not mulligan to prevent them from getting snapped. That was a good plan, as I was able to recruit Mr. fantastic after my first shuffle and he got replaced with Luke Cage Noir’s rare. 1st snap came soon after that. I focused on FFU and Luke Cage for the 4 cost power while my wife focus on BP and Iron man for the tech and draw power. It worked out for me as I was able to hit Kang multiple time in multiple turns. Game two didn’t fair too well for my 4 cost strategy, but my wife’s Iron man draw deck had her drawing her holes 20 card deck every turn. Overall fun set up.

column33: Black Panther MCU is legit with Brainstorm
It was a tough scheme and after a few Strikes Kang was impossible to hit.

Went for a combo of low cost cards jiving with Spider-man, they are so OP I was drawing my entire deck on one side every turn. At first was worried as I had a bunch of early scheme twists but those just helped me rescue the entire bystander deck.

My 1st attempt with Speed & Quicksilver was a lot of fun. They nearly drained the Bystander deck and they might have done even better had I realised that discarding my deck would have often included discarding some Diving Catch. I did realise this in my second attempt with Black Widow and Elektra though and they finished faster, with some awesome Spidey-Sai Blades combos, and both decks running lots of Angel cards. They nearly drained the Bystander stack too (except for the ones that were still in the Villain deck). Widow’s rare helped pick off Villains from the city. Re turn count, Madame Masque played a card from the Villian deck.

This was a lot of fun. I used heroes I haven’t played before and saw some good combinations. I changed heroes because I thought they would work better with the many Angel cards I got in the first game, but Angel never showed in the second game at all. I also tried KOing my Troopers early, which went counter to the hyper speed strategy I ended up drafting. First game was a powerhouse and the second game a race to the finish and just coming short when the deck ran out.

Pretty fun, the start was super chill, not too hard but spiderman is so annoying you feel like he's doing something but he's not in this game.  The thing gave huge flexibility, giving me jean grey rare on turn 6 and later thing rare, but the synergy deck wasn't as smooth as I would like.  I still got a lot more VP than my last run with both wolverines despite those decks having more synergy.

It was a fun setup.
